$comment: Layer 7.8 classifier-parity corpus. Each case feeds the SAME {narrative, semiotic_flags} to the TS heuristic classifier (logoc/src/peirce/classifier.ts) and the Python heuristic port (gnostic_engine/classification/heuristic.py). Both must produce the same class_id (or both flag ambiguous). Cases cover flag-driven decisions, narrative-keyword decisions, mixed, and ambiguous (no triad branch resolves). Flag names match SemioticFlags: single_occurrence, rule_based, similarity, causality, convention, possibility, fact, reason. Ambiguous cases expect BOTH runtimes to throw (class_id null).

cases.narrative: the pure feel of a sensation resembles an icon of a possibility
this single token is a causal trace of a possibility
cases.note: narrative keywords → Sinsign (this/single/token) + Index (causal/trace) + Rheme (possibility). Matches the orchestrator _COHERENT_NARRATIVE.

cases.narrative: the law is an arbitrary symbol of a theorem
this single event is a causal trace of a fact
the cat sat on the mat
cases.note: no flag, no keyword in any branch → both runtimes throw AmbiguousClassificationError.
vehicle resolves (Legisign) but object + interpretant have no flag and empty narrative → ambiguous.
object resolves (Index) but vehicle has no flag and empty narrative → ambiguous (vehicle branch first).

cases.narrative: the law is a causal pointer to a theorem
